name: Washington L&I Electrical Contractor License

agency.name: Washington State Department of Labor & Industries

updateFrequency: unknown for the lookup; verify against the official L&I Verify tool before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Washington L&I general electrical contractor licenses
Washington L&I specialty electrical contractor licenses
knownExclusions: This entry is scoped to electrical contractor licensing and related L&I verification metadata.
Individual electrician certifications, electrical permits, inspections, local permits, and utility-owned infrastructure are outside this source entry.
Solar projects may require electrical contractor credentials for electrical work plus other contractor registration or permit requirements depending on the scope.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Do not automate the L&I Verify lookup without a separate access-control, terms, and saved-fixture review.
publicRecordsNotes: Official L&I lookup metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a credential, permit, or local authorization does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official electrical-contractor-specific bulk download has been adapter-reviewed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Washington L&I electrical contractor verification. L&I states that businesses engaging in the electrical construction trade must get an electrical contractor license and that general and specialty electrical contractors have defined scopes.
maintainerNotes: Keep this source separate from the general contractor registration dataset until a stable electrical-contractor bulk shape is reviewed.

researchEvidence.note: Official L&I page reviewed; it states that businesses must get an electrical contractor license to engage in the electrical construction trade and describes general and specialty electrical contractor scopes.
Official L&I Verify lookup reviewed as the public verification path for contractors, tradespeople, and businesses.

blocker.summary: An official lookup exists, but no stable electrical-contractor-specific bulk or saved-fixture browser path has been adapter-reviewed.
